property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object Name
property.description: Automatically bind the page's object name to the component variable

property.name: accordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Accordion Background Color
property.description: The individual plan structure group accordion backgound color in hex code.

property.name: accordionTextColor
property.label: Accordion Text Color
property.description: The individual plan structure group accordion text color in hex code.

property.name: chatbotIconName
property.label: Chatbot Icon Name
property.description: Chatbot icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: chatbotIconSize
property.label: Chatbot Icon Size
property.description: Chatbot icon Size

property.name: chatbotIconColour
property.label: Chatbot Icon Colour
property.description: Chatbot icon colour

property.name: chatbotIconBackgroundColour
property.label: Chatbot Icon Background Colour
property.description: Chatbot icon background colour

property.name: showIpsGroupInfo
property.label: Show Individual Plan Structure Group Panel
property.description: Show individual plan structure group record info panel.

property.name: programCompletionVisualizerModalTitle
property.label: Program Completion Visualizer Modal Title
property.description: Program Completion Visualizer modal title.

property.name: programCompletionVisualizerModalIconName
property.label: Program Completion Visualizer Modal Icon Name
property.description: Program Completion Visualizer modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: ipsGroupTitleField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Title Field
property.description: The individual plan structure field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: ipsGroupTitleFormat
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Title Format
property.description: The individual plan structure format to be displayed as the title for group. {0} and {1} represent the percentage and the Individual Plan Structure Group Title Name field, respectively. e.g., [{0}%] {1}.

property.name: ipeInfoFields
property.label: IPE Highlight Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: ipeInfoColumnNo
property.label: IPE Highlight Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: ipsInfoFields
property.label: Individual Plan Highlight Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: ipsInfoFieldsUnit
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Highlight Fields (Unit)
property.description: Hightlights panel fields for Individual Plan Stucture Group with # of unit required type. In semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: ipsInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Plan Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: ipsUnitFields
property.label: Individual Plan Strucuture Fields (Unit)
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the unit tables in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: idvEnrollmentFields
property.label: Individual Enrollment Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the Individual Enrollment History tables in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Enable Clickable Ref Field
property.description: Enable reference e.g., Lookup and Master Detail field as clicklable in the datatable.

property.name: enableSetPrimaryIps
property.label: Enable Set Primary Individual Plan Structure
property.description: Enable action to set primary Individual Plan Structure (Unit).

property.name: enableViewEnrollmentHistory
property.label: Enable View Enrollment History
property.description: Enable action to view Individual Enrollment History.

property.name: hrefTargetType
property.label: Url/Reference Field Target Type
property.description: The target attributes specifies whether to open the url/reference field in the same window or a new window.

property.name: summaryInfoField
property.label: Summary Info Field
property.description: The summary fields for comparing the original individual program enrollment and the designated individual program enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c.

property.name: progressRingColor
property.label: Progress Ring Color
property.description: The Progress Ring Color in hex code. e.g., #3f48cc.

property.name: progressRingPercentageField
property.label: Progress Ring Percentage Field
property.description: The field used to render the progress ring.

property.name: pathwayVisualizerModalTitle
property.label: Pathway Visualizer Modal Title
property.description: Pathway Visualizer modal title.

property.name: pathwayVisualizerModalIconName
property.label: Pathway Visualizer Modal Icon Name
property.description: Pathway Visualizer modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayTermTitlePrefix
property.label: Study Pathway Term Title Prefix
property.description: Study pathway term prefix for the accordion title.

property.name: studyPathwayTermInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway Term Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway Unit Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitTitleField
property.label: Study Pathway Unit Highlights Title Field
property.description: The Study Unit field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitIcon
property.label: Study Pathway Unit Icon Name
property.description: Component study unit icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupTitleField
property.label: Study Pathway Group Highlights Title Field
property.description: The Study Plan Structure (Group) field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway Group Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupIcon
property.label: Study Pathway Group Icon Name
property.description: Component study group icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: comboboxLabel
property.label: Preview With Combobox Label
property.description: Component combobox label.

property.name: showStudyUnitQuickSearch
property.label: Show Study Unit Quick Search
property.description: Study Pathway Show Study Unit Quick Search.

property.name: showStudyPlanOptions
property.label: Show Study Plan Options
property.description: Show study plan options.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: forCommunity
property.label: (Obsolete) For Community?
property.description: This is no longer used.
